assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a work email they can verify.
No Okta Integrator Free Plan org, app integration, or runtime sample exists yet.
No application type or language has been chosen for the sign-in or API-protection quickstart.

developer_goal: Create an Okta Integrator Free Plan org and reach the first signed-in or protected-API success for a chosen application type and runtime.

first_success.outcome: A selected redirect sign-in or API-protection sample reaches its documented authenticated terminal state.
first_success.observable_signal: Depends on the unresolved app class and runtime; for example, a SPA Profile view showing the signed-in user and Sign out.

route_selection.surface: Okta Developer self-service web signup and Admin Console quickstarts
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete Integrator Free Plan route only after one application class and runtime are fixed.

candidates.name: Server-side web app redirect sign-in
candidates.reason: The Quickstart lists server-side web as a peer class with its own language guides and app-integration settings.

candidates.name: Front-end SPA redirect sign-in
candidates.reason: The Quickstart lists front-end web as a peer class; configuration and success UI differ from server and native routes.

candidates.name: Mobile or native app redirect sign-in
candidates.reason: Native apps use non-HTTP callbacks and platform-specific SDKs that cannot be compared as one universal path.

candidates.name: Protect your API
candidates.reason: API protection is a separate Quickstart outcome from interactive sign-in and changes the first-success signal.

required_path.action: Choose the Okta Integrator Free Plan on the developer signup surface and submit the visible signup form.

required_fields.label: Integrator Free Plan Agreement and Privacy Policy
required_fields.notes: Agreement text is shown with Sign up; a separate checkbox was not confirmed as required.

required_path.observable_result: Okta accepts the signup and sends a verification email to the provided address.

required_path.action: Open the activation link from the Okta verification email and set a new password.
required_path.observable_result: Okta redirects the developer to the Admin Console of the new Identity Engine org.

required_path.action: Create the app integration required by the selected Quickstart application class.

required_fields.label: Application class and sign-in method
required_fields.notes: OIDC versus other methods and SPA versus web versus native change required wizard fields.

required_path.observable_result: Okta creates an app integration with client credentials for the selected class.

required_path.action: Complete the selected language quickstart configuration and sample integration through first authenticated success.
required_path.observable_result: The selected sample reaches its documented signed-in or protected-API terminal state.

prerequisites.description: A work email address is required for the Integrator Free Plan signup form.
The developer must choose an application class and runtime before a complete integration path exists.

external_gates.description: Email delivery and activation are required before the Admin Console opens.
Integrator Free Plan access expires after 180 consecutive days of inactivity per the signup agreement text.

unavoidable_waits.description: Okta must deliver the account verification email with the activation link.

platform_outcomes.description: Okta creates an Identity Engine org and assigns the signup user the super administrator role after activation.
Okta generates app-integration credentials when a custom app is created.

excluded.item: Reading Sign users in overview and optional org setup for multifactor or password-optional policies
excluded.reason: Documentation reading and optional authenticator policy work are outside the measured required path until a route is fixed.

excluded.item: Creating test users, groups, and embedded widget settings from the set-up-org guide
excluded.reason: Those steps support broader org configuration and are not required for every Quickstart first-success route.

excluded.item: Auth0 Platform or Okta Platform commercial trial choices on the same signup chooser
excluded.reason: The Integrator Free Plan is the documented free developer org path for building integrations.

sources.title: Quickstart
evidence_supported: Server, SPA, native, and Protect your API peer routes

sources.title: Sign users in to your SPA using the redirect model
evidence_supported: One possible SPA redirect first-success route among several

uncertainties.question: Which Okta application class and runtime define the measured first-success route?
uncertainties.impact: The choice changes app-integration fields, SDKs, sample code, and the observable terminal signal.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Pick one bounded goal such as Angular SPA redirect sign-in, then verify the full current Admin Console and sample path against official docs and a fresh Integrator org.

uncertainties.question: Which authenticator enrollment or recovery screens appear after the activation link on a fresh Integrator Free Plan org?
uncertainties.impact: Extra factor enrollment would add required actions and fields before the Admin Console is usable.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated walkthrough from a fresh signup through activation into the Admin Console, including any Okta Verify or email-factor prompts.
